docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-04-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BULLITT OWNER DISCRUNTLED GOAT, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BULLITT OWNER DISCRUNTLED GOAT, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHASKER, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT BULLITT OWNER DISCRUNTLED GOAT, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SCHASKER, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT BULLITT OWNER DISCRUNTLED GOAT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DUNCAN LEY--OWNER. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHASKER, ANNA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHASKER, ANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BULLITT OWNER DISCRUNTLED GOAT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
